questions.questionText: An object moves at a steady speed in a straight line. What can be said about the forces acting on it?
options: The driving force is greater than friction

steps.description: Identifies that constant velocity means balanced forces
Correct answer: resultant force is zero

commonErrors: Thinking no forces act on the object
Thinking driving force must be greater because the object is moving

questions.questionText: A motorcycle and rider have a combined mass of 250 kg. The motorcycle accelerates at 4.0 m/s². Calculate the resultant force on the motorcycle.

commonErrors: Using a = F/m and getting confused

questions.questionText: A bag of rice has a mass of 5.0 kg. Gravitational field strength g = 10 N/kg. Calculate the weight of the bag.

commonErrors: Writing kg instead of N for the unit

questions.questionText: A lorry of mass 8000 kg travelling at 10 m/s collides with a stationary car of mass 1200 kg. They stick together after the collision. Calculate their velocity after the collision.

steps.description: By conservation: momentum after = 80 000 kg m/s

commonErrors: Forgetting to add the masses together after collision

questions.questionText: Explain how drinking alcohol affects a driver's stopping distance.

markScheme.answer: Alcohol increases reaction time, which increases the thinking distance, which increases the overall stopping distance.

steps.description: Alcohol increases the driver's reaction time
Therefore the total stopping distance increases

commonErrors: Saying alcohol affects braking distance instead of thinking distance
Not explaining the link between reaction time and thinking distance

questions.questionText: A helicopter has a weight of 25 000 N. The lift force from the rotor blades is 30 000 N. The air resistance is 2000 N horizontally. Calculate the magnitude of the resultant vertical force.

steps.description: Identifies vertical forces: lift = 30 000 N up, weight = 25 000 N down

commonErrors: Including air resistance in the vertical calculation
Adding lift and weight instead of subtracting
